channel.title: Tools on Nate Glenn's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Tools on Nate Glenn's Blog

item.title: List of Japanese NLP tools
item.author: garfieldnate <at> gmail <dot> com (Nathan Glenn)
item.description: I haven’t tried out all of these so I don’t have comments for everything, but hopefully this list will come in useful for someone. Morphological analyzers/tokenizers Itadaki: a Japanese processing module for OpenOffice. I’ve done a tiny bit of work and issue documentation on a fork here, and someone forked that to work with a Japanese/German dictionary here. GoSen: Uses sen as a base, and is part of Itadaki; a pure Java version of ChaSen.
